task_completion.description: Navigate to the OpenMRS Administration or System Administration dashboard
task_completion.visual_evidence: The OpenMRS Administration page or System Administration dashboard is visible in the web browser.
The 'Manage Roles' or 'Roles' list page is displayed, showing a table or list of existing system roles.
The role editing screen specifically for the 'Trainee' role is open, showing its name and description.
In the 'Trainee' role edit screen, the checkbox next to 'Provider' is checked, or 'Provider' is explicitly added to the 'Inherited Roles' or 'Inherits from' selection area.
A success message (e.g., 'Role saved') is visible, or the role details/list page is shown reflecting that 'Trainee' now successfully inherits from 'Provider'.

integrity.description: Agent used the OpenMRS web interface to configure the role
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the OpenMRS web application in a browser, rather than terminal windows executing curl commands or scripts.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the genuine OpenMRS instance
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser address bar shows a valid local OpenMRS/Bahmni URL (e.g., localhost or a local IP) rather than a local static file path.

integrity.description: Agent did not modify the 'Provider' role itself
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent is only seen editing the 'Trainee' role. There should be no screens showing the 'Provider' role being edited or its name/description being changed.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires modifying the 'Trainee' role to inherit from the 'Provider' role in OpenMRS. 'Trainee' is a custom role created for this task, and 'Provider' is a core predefined role. Success is verified when 'Provider' is added to the inherited roles list of the 'Trainee' role via the OpenMRS UI.
